description: Counterparty inserts narrow mutual IP indemnification capped by Section 8. This is an explicit acceptable_variation in the indemnification topic and must ACCEPT without triggering no-exos-indemnity.

must_not_flag.reason: Narrow mutual IP indemnification capped by Section 8 is listed as an acceptable_variation; the no-exos-indemnity rule must not fire on this insertion.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Each party (the 'Indemnifying Party') shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party (the 'Indemnified Party') from and against any third-party claims alleging that materials provided by the Indemnifying Party infringe any third-party intellectual property right, subject to and capped by the mutual aggregate liability limit set forth in Section 8.
planted_variation.notes: Mutual IP indemnification, capped by Section 8. Matches acceptable_variation 'mutual third-party IP-infringement indemnification, capped by Section 8'.

detector_expectation.rationale: The no-exos-indemnity rule fires on general or one-way indemnification. Narrow mutual IP indemnification capped by Section 8 is an accepted variation; the rule must not fire on it after the fix.
